subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1912-04-22 in Washington
subcodes.first_line: All nations must become socialistic in spirit. People must not be forced by circumstances to help the poor. They must give aid willingly.
subcodes.subjects: @the economic problem and its solution; voluntary giving, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @critiques of capitalism, communism, socialism, @wealth inequality and its moderation
